taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Data Analysis, Data Scientist
core_skills: Business Intelligence, Financial Reporting, Data Warehousing, Requirements gathering, SQL
skill_match_scores: Business Intelligence:0.0, Financial Reporting:0.0, Data Warehousing:0.0, Requirements gathering:0.0, SQL:1.0
must_have_quals: High school diploma or GED required, Minimum three (3) years' experience working with Business Intelligence, Analytics, Financial Reporting Data Warehousing technologies, and/or related required, Minimum three (3) years' experience utilizing proven requirements gathering and business analysis techniques required; must have a complete understanding of the business intelligence development life cycle including the ability to conduct interviews and gather the needs for desired outcomes for the BI solutions being built, Intermediate experience querying relational databases and data warehouses (such as SQL Server, Databricks, Snowflake, etc.) required, Intermediate Microsoft Excel experience required including writing and using advanced functions and formulas (e.g., lookup & reference, nested logical expressions, aggregation, etc.) as well as advanced Excel features (e.g., conditional formatting, data validation, pivot tables, external data connections), Working knowledge of Microsoft Office (Outlook, Word) required, Excellent verbal and written communication and problem-solving skills, Strong business analysis skills and technical aptitude
preferred_quals: Bachelor's degree in computer science, mathematics, finance, accounting, economics, statistics, business management, information systems and/or related preferred, Working knowledge of Tableau or Power BI highly preferred
core_responsibilities: Utilizes business intelligence tools (Power BI, Tableau, SQL, DataBricks, etc.) to develop analytical content including reports, dashboards, semantic models, and data sets. Supports end-user adoption of reporting and creation of documentation as needed, Utilizes relational database and data warehouse design skills to codify business logic in SQL to meet reporting requirements for all areas of operation, Collaborates with business unit owners to elicit requirements using interviews and data analysis, develop and/or improve work product, and create new features in existing report packages, Works to proactively identify data quality issues, debug erroneous logic and perform QA validations
job_summary: AMH is one of the leading single-family rental companies and homebuilders in the country, recognized as a top employer. The Senior Enterprise Data Analyst will analyze and report on data from data warehouses, create reports and dashboards, and engage with stakeholders to inform business decisions.
